title: Hiring an app developer for Monday

posts.author: Dchau2401 (David C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am working with a portfolio company in the real estate space,

We need a developer to create a custom app on Monday that will allow us to integrate with a mobile and web app for displaying inventory for open / closed deals and also property submissions.

Currently we have an Mobile & web app that submits to an azure database, but we want to build an app directly on Monday to just be our database.

In addition, we are also looking for a feasibility check for a google chrome extension that will help scan the web pages to see if there are properties we have already worked on that might match onto the crm database. For example if we are looking at a property on redfin or zillow, if the property is already in our database, then it will highlight the property.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Dchau2401, and thank you for turning to the monday.com community forums! This sounds like a very interesting project and I would be interested in seeing how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help.

We specialize in a component-by-component stye and have actually done a few different custom solutions that are similar to what you are looking for. Including creating custom apps for our clients.

If you’d like to schedule an initial call to explore what is possible please schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get this going!

posts.cookedHtml:
